title: Classic Colors
description: Pre-1.12 colors for beds and concrete blocks.
body:
## About
Backport of the old wool and shulker textures, and tweaks to the concrete and bed textures to fit in with the old colors, as the colors introduced in the 1.12 update were too saturated compared to the older ones. Glazed terracotta left untouched, can't bother as I personally never use those blocks.

## Recommended
Programmer Art is recommended of course. Check out these other P.A. themed texture packs for the newer versions (I personally use the Continuation Project, hence why I made this pack):

- [Programmer Art Continuation Project](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pacp)
- [Golden Days Base](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/golden-days/gallery)
- [Justzilla's Classic Pack](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/justamedomz-s-classic-pack-1-16-2-1-17/)
- [Nostalgia+](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/programmer-art-nostalgia-return-s/)
